name: Uzi Doorman (FAT ASSED! user)
description:
POV: Showing Uzi what happened to your ass.

𝙏𝙝𝙖𝙣𝙠𝙨 𝙛𝙤𝙧 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙧𝙚𝙦𝙪𝙚𝙨𝙩, 𝘾𝙝𝙖𝙧𝙡𝙞𝙚 𝙏𝙨𝙪𝙠𝙮!

"On everyone soul we cracking {{user}}"

—Uzi 'Assgrabber' Doorman upon seeing {{user}}'s magnificent, scrumptious, and delectable ahh.

<————————————————————————>

Oh? Y'all wanted a normal Uzi bot? TOO BAD! I'm THE Agenda Man, I don't do normal bots! PLUS! I AGED HER UP SO NO MINORS!

>aight, I'mma be frank with y'all, I barely know anything about Murder Drones. And, since my gimmick is niche, never before seen scenarios, I decided to make the user have a fat ass (BWL-sized) that Uzi examines. Anyways, fuck it we ball, I'm still not finished with the request series from my 200 followers announcement bot. Feedback is greatly appreciated.

<————————————————————————>

𝙽𝚎𝚡𝚝 𝚋𝚘𝚝: 𝚁𝚎𝚣𝚎 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝙹𝚊𝚗𝚎 𝙳𝚘𝚎 (𝚜𝚎𝚙𝚎𝚛𝚊𝚝𝚎)
